opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: ProClimate has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only for all inquiries.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours are booking competitors with online availability instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 scheduling widget to capture after-hours HVAC service and installation requests.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM
opportunities.signal: No CRM or marketing tools detected; phone-only contact means zero digital lead tracking exists.
opportunities.observation: Every unbooked or missed call from Boise customers is lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture with automatic CRM logging to retain every lead and caller detail.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools detected and no recurring service signals on the ProClimate website.
opportunities.observation: Boise's harsh winters and hot summers make seasonal tune-ups a reliable recurring revenue stream being missed.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal maintenance reminders via SMS and email to convert past customers into recurring service contracts.
